name: curated-marketplace
description: Curated third-party and upstream Claude Code plugins — favored external plugins sourced from their original repos.

plugins.name: agent-browser
plugins.description: Browser automation plugin for agent-driven web app testing, inspection, and debugging.

plugins.name: agent-sdk-dev
plugins.description: Development kit for working with the Claude Agent SDK

plugins.name: agent-teams
plugins.description: Orchestrate multi-agent teams for parallel code review, hypothesis-driven debugging, and coordinated feature development using Claude Code's Agent Teams

plugins.name: beads
plugins.description: AI-supervised issue tracker for coding workflows

plugins.name: beagle-ai
plugins.description: Pydantic AI, LangGraph, DeepAgents, and Vercel AI SDK skills

plugins.name: beagle-analysis
plugins.description: Architecture analysis, brainstorming, 12-Factor compliance, ADR generation, and LLM-as-judge

plugins.name: beagle-python
plugins.description: Python, FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, PostgreSQL, and pytest code review

plugins.name: beagle-react
plugins.description: React, React Flow, React Router, shadcn/ui, Tailwind, Vitest, and Zustand code review

plugins.name: beagle-rust
plugins.description: Rust, tokio, axum, serde, sqlx, and async concurrency code review

plugins.name: chrome-devtools-mcp
plugins.description: Control and inspect a live Chrome browser from your coding agent. Record performance traces, analyze network requests, check console messages with source-mapped stack traces, and automate browser actions with Puppeteer.

plugins.name: claude-code-setup
plugins.description: Analyze codebases and recommend tailored Claude Code automations such as hooks, skills, MCP servers, and subagents.

plugins.name: claude-md-management
plugins.description: Tools to maintain and improve CLAUDE.md files - audit quality, capture session learnings, and keep project memory current.

plugins.name: claude-session-driver
plugins.description: Launch, control, and monitor other Claude Code sessions as workers via tmux

plugins.name: code-documentation
plugins.description: Documentation generation, code explanation, and technical writing with automated doc generation and tutorial creation

plugins.name: code-refactoring
plugins.description: Code cleanup, refactoring automation, and technical debt management with context restoration

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Automated code review for pull requests using multiple specialized agents with confidence-based scoring to filter false positives

plugins.name: code-simplifier
plugins.description: Agent that simplifies and refines code for clarity, consistency, and maintainability while preserving functionality. Focuses on recently modified code.

plugins.name: codebase-cleanup
plugins.description: Technical debt reduction, dependency updates, and code refactoring automation

plugins.name: codex-plugin-cc
plugins.description: OpenAI Codex plugin for Claude Code interoperability.

plugins.name: coderabbit
plugins.description: Your code review partner. CodeRabbit provides external validation using a specialized AI architecture and 40+ integrated static analyzers — offering a different perspective that catches bugs, security vulnerabilities, logic errors, and edge cases. Context-aware analysis via AST parsing and codegraph relationships. Automatically incorporates CLAUDE.md and project coding guidelines into reviews. Free to use.

plugins.name: comprehensive-review
plugins.description: Multi-perspective code analysis covering architecture, security, and best practices

plugins.name: conductor
plugins.description: Context-Driven Development plugin that transforms Claude Code into a project management tool with structured workflow: Context → Spec & Plan → Implement

plugins.name: discord
plugins.description: Discord messaging bridge with built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /discord:access.

plugins.name: double-shot-latte
plugins.description: Stop 'Would you like me to continue?' interruptions. Automatically evaluates whether Claude should continue working using Claude-judged decision making.

plugins.name: fakechat
plugins.description: Localhost web chat for testing the channel notification flow. No tokens, no access control, no third-party service.

plugins.name: feature-dev
plugins.description: Comprehensive feature development workflow with specialized agents for codebase exploration, architecture design, and quality review

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

plugins.name: frontend-mobile-development
plugins.description: Frontend UI development and mobile application implementation across platforms

plugins.name: gopls-lsp
plugins.description: Go language server for code intelligence and refactoring

plugins.name: javascript-typescript
plugins.description: JavaScript and TypeScript development with ES6+, Node.js, React, and modern web frameworks

plugins.name: kotlin-lsp
plugins.description: Kotlin language server for code intelligence

plugins.name: lavra
plugins.description: 30 specialized agents, 28 commands, 15 skills, persistent memory with auto-recall

plugins.name: llm-application-dev
plugins.description: LLM application development with LangGraph, RAG systems, vector search, and AI agent architectures

plugins.name: mcp-server-dev
plugins.description: Skills for designing and building MCP servers that work seamlessly with Claude. Guides you through deployment models (remote HTTP, MCPB, local), tool design patterns, auth, and interactive MCP apps.

plugins.name: playground
plugins.description: Creates interactive HTML playgrounds — self-contained single-file explorers with visual controls, live preview, and prompt output with copy button.

plugins.name: plugin-dev
plugins.description: Comprehensive toolkit for developing Claude Code plugins. Includes 7 expert skills covering hooks, MCP integration, commands, agents, and best practices.

plugins.name: pr-review-toolkit
plugins.description: Comprehensive PR review agents specializing in comments, tests, error handling, type design, code quality, and code simplification

plugins.name: pyright-lsp
plugins.description: Python language server (Pyright) for type checking and code intelligence

plugins.name: python-development
plugins.description: Modern Python development with Python 3.12+, Django, FastAPI, async patterns, and production best practices

plugins.name: ralph-loop
plugins.description: Interactive self-referential AI loops for iterative development, implementing the Ralph Wiggum technique. Claude works on the same task repeatedly, seeing its previous work, until completion.

plugins.name: repomix-commands
plugins.description: Repomix slash commands for packing local and remote repositories

plugins.name: repomix-explorer
plugins.description: Repomix explorer agents for analyzing local and remote codebases

plugins.name: repomix-mcp
plugins.description: Repomix MCP server for AI-optimized codebase analysis

plugins.name: rust-analyzer-lsp
plugins.description: Rust language server for code intelligence and analysis

plugins.name: serena
plugins.description: Semantic code analysis MCP server providing intelligent code understanding, refactoring suggestions, and codebase navigation through language server protocol integration.

plugins.name: session-report
plugins.description: Generate an explorable HTML report of Claude Code session usage — tokens, cache efficiency, subagents, skills, and the most expensive prompts — from local ~/.claude/projects transcripts.

plugins.name: shell-scripting
plugins.description: Production-grade Bash scripting with defensive programming, POSIX compliance, and comprehensive testing

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Create new skills, improve existing skills, and measure skill performance. Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, update or optimize an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, or benchmark skill performance with variance analysis.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Core skills library: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

plugins.name: superpowers-developing-for-claude-code
plugins.description: Skills and resources for developing Claude Code plugins, skills, MCP servers, and extensions. Includes comprehensive official documentation and self-update mechanism.

plugins.name: systems-programming
plugins.description: Systems programming with Rust, Go, C, and C++ for performance-critical and low-level development

plugins.name: tdd-workflows
plugins.description: Test-driven development methodology with red-green-refactor cycles and code review

plugins.name: telegram
plugins.description: Telegram messaging bridge with built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /telegram:access.

plugins.name: typescript-lsp
plugins.description: TypeScript/JavaScript language server for enhanced code intelligence

plugins.name: ui-design
plugins.description: Comprehensive UI/UX design plugin for mobile (iOS, Android, React Native) and web applications with design systems, accessibility, and modern patterns

plugins.name: zsh-tool
plugins.description: Zsh shell for Claude Code - full terminal control, live output, PTY mode for interactive commands

plugins.name: broadcastr
plugins.description: Real-time activity broadcast across concurrent Claude Code sessions. Captures commits, plan edits, bash commands into a shared JSONL bus.
